parameters.content:
## New Hire Onboarding Tracker

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set ONBOARDING_EMAIL_TO (manager + HR)
3. Trigger when a new hire joins with their start date and onboarding checklist
4. Code nodes track milestone completion vs. expected timeline, flag overdue items — no LLM
5. Approval gate before status report is shared with HR

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: Onboarding Report — {{ $json.meta.total_overdue }} overdue milestone(s)
parameters.message:
=
{{ $json.report_text }}

Approve and share with HR | Reject

parameters.subject: =Onboarding Alert: {{ $('Format Onboarding Report').first().json.meta.total_overdue }} overdue milestone(s) — action required
